summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Recommended Drills section on Video Analysis page (/analysis/v-seed-1). All features working correctly: toggle tabs (Recommended/AI Insights), weakest skills context text in orange, 5 YouTube drill rows with thumbnails/YT badge/title/description/duration/difficulty/section, DrillVideoModal popup with embedded YouTube iframe, close button and overlay click to close.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Skill mapping correctly identifies weakest skills (Defense & Net Play for v-seed-1)
YouTube thumbnails correctly extracted from embed URLs using img.youtube.com
Modal autoplay=1 parameter correctly appended to iframe src
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data from youtubeDrills.js (50 YouTube drill entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recommended Drills section fully tested. Key test IDs: recommended-drills-card, drills-tabs, drills-tab-recommended, drills-tab-insights, yt-drill-row-{drill_id}, drill-video-modal, drill-video-modal-overlay, drill-video-iframe, drill-modal-title, drill-modal-close. Drills are filtered based on player's 2 weakest skills using SKILL_TAG_MAP. For v-seed-1 (baseScore=72), weakest skills are Defense & Net Play, showing drills from 'Defense & Reaction Training', 'Dropshots & Soft Game', and 'Net Play & Net Control' sections.
